# Bernard Zachara — Junior Cloud / DevOps Engineer

> Personal portfolio and resume site for Bernard Zachara, a junior Cloud / DevOps engineer focused on Linux operations, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, and self-hosted infrastructure.

## About

Bernard Zachara is a junior Cloud / DevOps engineer focused on Linux operations, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, and practical host security on an Oracle Cloud VPS.

## Skills

- Containers & Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes, K3s, containerd
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GHCR
- Cloud Platforms: Oracle Cloud (production), AWS (hands-on Terraform labs), Azure (hands-on Terraform labs)
- Networking & Security: Traefik, Tailscale, UFW, fail2ban
- Scripting & Languages: Bash, Python, TypeScript, YAML

## Contact

- Email: bernard@zachara.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/benzac708
- Website: https://zachara.dev

## Live Projects (GitHub)

- [zachara-dev](https://github.com/benzac708/zachara-dev): Portfolio site — Docker + K3s + GitHub Actions
- [vps-ops-toolkit](https://github.com/benzac708/vps-ops-toolkit): VPS maintenance scripts
- [cloud-labs-iac](https://github.com/benzac708/cloud-labs-iac): Terraform labs for AWS/Azure
